title: echinacea pallida var. sanguinea
intro: Echinacea pallida var. sanguinea, also known as the blood-red coneflower or eastern pink coneflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Echinacea pallida var. sanguinea include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce the severity of colds and flu, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. Echinacea pallida var. sanguinea can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall health.
